site.name: AimAze Tech Solutions
site.tagline: Odoo ERP, Automation & Digital Transformation Partner in UAE

hero.heading: Odoo ERP, Automation & Finance Dashboards
hero.subheading: for Growth-Focused UAE and International Businesses
hero.text: AimAze Tech Solutions helps management teams replace scattered spreadsheets with controlled ERP workflows, live dashboards, CRM automation and scalable digital systems built around real business operations.

services.title: Odoo ERP Implementation
services.text: Module planning, configuration, migration, training and go-live support for CRM, sales, finance, HR, inventory and operations.

services.title: Odoo Customization
services.text: Custom workflows, dashboards, approvals, automated reports and business-specific modules built around your processes.

services.title: CRM & Sales Automation
services.text: Lead management, pipeline stages, follow-ups, quotation workflow and full management visibility.

services.title: Finance Dashboards
services.text: CFO dashboards, receivable tracking, margin reporting, VAT workflows and real-time KPI visibility.

services.title: Custom Software & Websites
services.text: Professional business websites, portals, internal tools and web applications built for growth.

services.title: IT Support & Digital Advisory
services.text: Process review, automation roadmaps, integration planning and long-term technology support.

why.heading: Built for control, adoption and measurable business results.
why.text: We combine ERP implementation with finance, operations and management reporting expertise, so the system is not only installed — it is used, controlled and improved after go-live.

points.title: Executive-level process mapping
points.text: We start from management controls, approval flows, reporting needs and user responsibilities before configuring software.

points.title: Odoo + finance understanding
points.text: CRM, accounting, sales, HR and inventory are configured with proper visibility for owners, CFOs and department heads.

points.title: CRM-ready lead generation
points.text: Website inquiries can be pushed into Odoo CRM or your chosen lead endpoint, with a professional fallback email workflow.

points.title: Post-go-live governance
points.text: Training, adoption support, issue tracking and continuous improvement are treated as part of the implementation journey.

process.title: Discover
process.text: We study your current process, pain points, reports and required controls.

process.title: Design
process.text: We map the right Odoo modules, workflows, roles and dashboards for your needs.

process.title: Implement
process.text: We configure, customize, migrate data and test everything with your users.

process.title: Train & Support
process.text: We train your team and keep improving the system after go-live.
